market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Anfield Road Guesthouse Near Reds Stadium
analysis.rewritten_desc: Step into this exclusive Liverpool townhome just minutes from Anfield Stadium and the heart of Liverpool's cultural district. With four spacious guest rooms and modern furnishings, this Entire Home rental offers both privacy and convenience for fans and tourists. Located at 128 Anfield Road, guests enjoy direct access to public transportation routes leading to Liverpool's top attractions including the Cavern Club, Museum of Liverpool, and the waterfront. The property has received 5.0 ratings from all 6 reviews for its exceptional location and cleanliness. While the nightly rate of £1058.72 reflects the premium location, this could be more competitive with targeted amenities enhancements. Current availability shows 76 open nights in the next 90 days. Contact the host for special match-day packages or weekend stay arrangements. Parking information and specific check-in instructions will be provided upon reservation confirmation.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize a clean wide-angle shot of the living room as the cover photo to immediately showcase space and layout potential
key_diagnosis: Priced at 505% above cohort median rate (£175 vs £1058.72) while maintaining only 15.2% occupancy vs 28.3% market average
No amenities listed despite being 'Entire home' type, losing competitiveness in high-amenity Liverpool market
Blank description with only address mentioned in title, failing to highlight key differentiators like stadium adjacency or location perks
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £1058.72 rate is 505% above median while showing 13% lower occupancy (15.2% vs 28.3%) among Liverpool listings
